description_long: This rifle features a classic AK-style silhouette with a combination of metallic silver, black, and gold accents throughout its body. The stock is fixed and angular, with a gold buttplate and trim, while the handguard and receiver are finished in a sleek silver tone. The magazine is curved and detachable, adorned with a gold pattern that matches the trim on the rest of the rifle. The barrel is standard length, ending in a gold-tipped muzzle device, and the rifle is equipped with traditional iron sights. The trigger, safety lever, and magazine release are all visible and appear functional, with the overall design suggesting a modernized yet traditional aesthetic. The surface finish is smooth and slightly glossy, giving the rifle a polished, high-quality appearance.
description: A modern AK-style rifle with a fixed stock, silver and gold accents, a curved detachable magazine, and iron sights. The design is sleek, with a smooth, polished finish and detailed gold trim.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the gold-tipped barrel and a narrow profile of the handguard and front sight.
description_view_1: A full left-side view reveals the fixed stock, curved magazine, gold and silver color scheme, and all major components including the trigger and iron sights.
description_view_2: Viewed from the buttstock, the rifle's gold buttplate and the alignment of the stock and receiver are prominent, with the magazine and barrel mostly obscured.
description_view_3: The right-side view displays the same features as the left, with the safety lever and magazine release more visible, and the gold trim continuing throughout.
